Ong Bak 2

องค์บาก 2

"Warrior. Conqueror. Legend."

6.5
2008MOVIERReleased

Synopsis

Tien, the son of Lord Sihadecho — a murdered nobleman — is taken under the wing of Chernang, a renowned warrior and leader of the Pha Beek Krut.
